conflict_summary: FAQ showed per-video pricing ($0.99/$1.99/$4.99) which contradicts the actual credit-based subscription model.
proposed_truth: Subscription allots monthly credits, credits buy exports. No dollar-per-video pricing exists.
proposed_replacement_copy: PRICING IS BASED ON MONTHLY SUBSCRIPTION TIERS. EACH TIER INCLUDES A CREDIT ALLOTMENT. EXPORTS COST CREDITS.

conflict_summary: Privacy policy stated 24 hours for ALL content including generated exports, but exports are actually retained for 29 days.
proposed_truth: Uploads retained 24 hours, exports retained 29 days. These are distinct retention periods.
proposed_replacement_copy: UPLOADED SOURCE VIDEOS ARE STORED FOR 24 HOURS. GENERATED EXPORTS ARE AVAILABLE FOR 29 DAYS.

conflict_summary: FAQ stated 7-day file retention which contradicts actual retention policy.
proposed_truth: Uploads retained 24 hours, exports retained 29 days.
proposed_replacement_copy: YOUR UPLOADED VIDEOS ARE STORED FOR 24 HOURS. YOUR GENERATED EXPORTS REMAIN AVAILABLE FOR 29 DAYS.

conflict_summary: Terms of service stated 'no subscription required' but subscriptions do exist and are required to use the service.
proposed_truth: Subscription IS required. All users must have an active subscription plan to process videos.
proposed_replacement_copy: A SUBSCRIPTION IS REQUIRED TO USE CUTMV. CHOOSE A PLAN THAT FITS YOUR NEEDS.

conflict_summary: Multiple pages conflated upload retention and export retention as a single duration instead of distinguishing the two different retention periods.
proposed_truth: Must always distinguish uploads (24 hours) from exports (29 days). Never refer to generic 'file retention' without specifying which type.
proposed_replacement_copy: UPLOADED VIDEOS: 24 HOURS. GENERATED EXPORTS: 29 DAYS. DOWNLOAD YOUR EXPORTS BEFORE THEY EXPIRE.

conflict_summary: Any remaining references to dollar amounts in FAQ or marketing copy contradicts credit-based pricing model.
proposed_truth: Only credit-based pricing exists. Never mention dollar amounts in relation to individual exports or processing.
proposed_replacement_copy: ALL PRICING IS CREDIT-BASED. YOUR MONTHLY SUBSCRIPTION INCLUDES A CREDIT ALLOTMENT FOR GENERATING EXPORTS.
